hero.title: Logistics solutions without borders
hero.subtitle: Since 1997, Elite Cargo flies your air freight from Conakry to the whole world, and handles transit, customs and moving — import and export alike, wherever you are.

about.title: About Us
about.text1: Elite Cargo is a leading freight and logistics group in West Africa. Over 25 years of expertise in air, sea and land freight lets us deliver complete, tailored solutions — for both import and export.
about.text2: Our strength: a network of subsidiaries strategically located in Guinea, Mali, Benin and Sierra Leone, plus partners worldwide. Wherever your goods are, we ship or receive them for you. A qualified team and modern infrastructure ensure excellence at every step.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Air freight to the whole world — plus GSA representation, transit, customs, cold chain, special cargo and moving.

freight.title: Air Freight
freight.description: Complete freight management on major airlines with optimized tracking and security.

customs.title: Customs & Transit
customs.description: Customs formalities, import/export transit, specialized documentation on demand.

moving.title: Moving
moving.description: Complete solutions for professional and personal international relocations.

stats.title: Our Numbers
stats.subtitle: Over 25 years of expertise in international freight and logistics.

reasons.title: Why Choose Us
reasons.subtitle: Reliable and efficient logistics solutions for your transportation needs

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.desc: Respected deadlines and precise end-to-end tracking.

reactivity.title: Reactivity
reactivity.desc: A team available 7 days a week to support you.

network.title: Global Network
network.desc: Member of the World Freight Network — over 150 partners to import and export anywhere in the world.

expertise.title: Expertise & Infrastructure
expertise.desc: Qualified personnel and modern infrastructure for excellence in service.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: A team of experts dedicated to your satisfaction

branches.title: Our Branches
branches.subtitle: Four branches in West Africa plus the World Freight Network — over 150 partners to ship and receive your goods anywhere in the world.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.subtitle: Strategic partnerships with major airlines
partners.description: We collaborate with trusted partners to ensure quality service

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are at your disposal to answer all your questions and support you in your transport and logistics projects.
